response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software craftsmanship, mentoring, and leadership capabilities, the resume falls significantly short on two critical minimum qualifications: C++ programming experience (approximately 1 year vs. 8 years required) and large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems experience (approximately 2 years vs. 5 years required). The role demands deep expertise in systems-level programming and cloud compute architecture; this candidate's background is primarily full-stack web development with diverse languages.
strengths: Proven technical leadership across multiple senior/staff roles with mentoring experience through workshops, talks, and team contributions
Strong commitment to software engineering best practices including TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and architectural clarity
Demonstrated ability to learn and master diverse technical domains and languages across web, mobile, embedded, and data systems
concerns: Critical gap in C++ experience: only ~1 year (National Instruments 2014-2015) vs. 8 years minimum requirement; career primarily TypeScript/Node.js, D, and Java
Insufficient large-scale infrastructure depth: ~2 years (Sociomantic microservices) vs. 5 years required for distributed systems, networking, and compute architecture
No demonstrated production cloud platform architecture experience; AWS CDK usage at Optilyz is tool-level work, not platform design or infrastructure strategy
